_meta.note: Functions copied verbatim from index.html. This is the parity contract for crates/silent-notes/src/qwen.rs.

basic_pipe.input:
DECISION| We will ship on Friday
ACTION| Bob will write the docs

colon_sep.input:
DECISION: Adopt Rust
KEYPOINT: latency dropped 40%

emdash_sep.input: QUESTION – who owns the rollout plan

topic_carry.input:
TOPIC| Roadmap planning
DECISION| Ship v2 in Q3
ACTION| draft the spec

topic_resets.input:
TOPIC| First topic
KEYPOINT| fact one
TOPIC| Second topic
KEYPOINT| fact two

bullet_prefix.input:
- DECISION| use the cache
* ACTION| Carol reviews it

think_stripped.input:
<think>reasoning here
more reasoning</think>DECISION| ship it now

topic_truncation.input:
TOPIC| A very long topic heading that runs well beyond sixty characters and should be truncated
KEYPOINT| a note that carries the truncated topic

output.text: a note that carries the truncated topic
output.topic: A very long topic heading that runs well beyond sixty chara…

lowercase_tags.input:
decision| accepted the plan
action| ship the build

unknown_tag_skipped.input:
RANDOM| not a real tag
DECISION| this one counts

blank_lines.input:
DECISION| keep going


ACTION| Dan ships

two_short_pack.text: First sentence here. Second sentence here.
output: First sentence here. Second sentence here.

splits_on_target.text: Alpha beta gamma. Delta epsilon zeta. Eta theta iota.

no_punctuation.text: just a run on fragment with no terminal punctuation at all
output: just a run on fragment with no terminal punctuation at all

questions_and_bangs.text: Are we ready? Yes we are! Then go.
output: Are we ready? Yes we are! Then go.

trailing_fragment.text: Complete sentence. Dangling end without a period
output: Complete sentence. Dangling end without a period

default_target_500.text: Sentence one is here. Sentence two follows.
output: Sentence one is here. Sentence two follows.

input.text: we will migrate the database to postgres
migrate the database to postgres soon

output.text: we will migrate the database to postgres

input.text: alice ships the api gateway changes
the latency target is fifty milliseconds
alice ships the api gateway changes again

output.text: alice ships the api gateway changes
the latency target is fifty milliseconds
